creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
markus      2007-10-31 00:21:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-p2p/ktorrent     Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-p2p/ktorrent/files patch-apps-ktorrent-fileselectdlg.cpp 
  Log:
  - Add patch to fix broken preexisting file check, which can result in files
    being deleted when the user deselects them and they already exist
    (KDE BUG 150563).
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/117654
  Submitted by:   Shane Bell <decept0@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    portmgr (erwin)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.24      +1 -0      ports/net-p2p/ktorrent/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/net-p2p/ktorrent/files/patch-apps-ktorrent-fileselectdlg.cpp (new)
